tools.name: mod_suitedash_wire
tools.description: Create or confirm a SuiteDash client record, optionally wire client portal and billing hooks. ALWAYS include operating_llc, run_id, and dynasty_component in the client's custom fields. NEVER create a duplicate — if the client matches an existing record by email or business name, return the existing record.

tools.name: mod_acumbamail_wire
tools.description: Create an Acumbamail list and upload a welcome sequence. ALWAYS use a verified sender identity — attempting to send from an unverified domain fails silently and breaks the verification signal. The welcome sequence must be at least 3 emails.

tools.name: mod_n8n_import_and_activate
tools.description: Import a workflow JSON from the run's GitHub repo into n8n, then activate it. ALWAYS use the n8n base at https://n8n.audreysplace.place. The Code node on the Flint VM is sandboxed — workflows that need child_process/fs/os must use SSH or the bridge instead; verify the workflow definition does not rely on forbidden modules before activating.

tools.name: mod_insighto_wire
tools.description: Create an Insighto chatbot, wire its knowledge base from the run's repo content, test one message round-trip. ALWAYS run a verification fetch after wiring — a 200 on create does not guarantee the bot will respond.

tools.name: mod_callscaler_wire
tools.description: Wire a CallScaler number. For PA CROP the default is 814-228-2822; new properties get new numbers per the plan. ALWAYS verify inbound routing by triggering a test webhook.

tools.name: mod_thoughtly_wire
tools.description: Wire a Thoughtly voice agent to a provisioned number. Test one call round-trip before marking verified.

tools.name: mod_smsit_wire
tools.description: Wire the SMS-iT flow. Send one test message to a verified internal number (not the customer's) and confirm delivery before marking verified.

tools.name: mod_trafft_wire
tools.description: Wire Trafft scheduling. Verify by creating and immediately cancelling one test booking against an internal test slot.

tools.name: verify_integration
tools.description: Generic verification fetch — GET or read-only call to confirm a prior wiring took effect. Use whenever a wire tool's 200 response does not by itself prove the integration works.

tools.name: emit_halt
tools.description: Halt per halt-conditions or escalation policy.

tools.name: submit_results
tools.description: Return the list of wired integrations per the submit contract in loop.txt.
